<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>TP PostgreSQL avec Docker — Salim Amir</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;400;500;700&family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{--bg:#0d1117;--surface:#161b22;--surface2:#1c2333;--border:#30363d;--accent:#3b82f6;--accent2:#06b6d4;--text:#e6edf3;--muted:#8b949e;--code-bg:#0d1117}
  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
  body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;line-height:1.7;min-height:100vh}
  .hero{position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding:72px 40px 52px;text-align:center;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% -10%,rgba(59,130,246,0.15) 0%,transparent 70%),radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 40% at 80% 100%,rgba(6,182,212,0.08) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none}
  .hero-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(59,130,246,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(59,130,246,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:40px 40px}
  .badge-row{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:24px;position:relative}
  .badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 13px;border-radius:999px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;border:1px solid;letter-spacing:.03em}
  .badge-blue{background:rgba(59,130,246,0.12);border-color:rgba(59,130,246,0.35);color:#93c5fd}
  .badge-cyan{background:rgba(6,182,212,0.12);border-color:rgba(6,182,212,0.35);color:#67e8f9}
  .badge-green{background:rgba(34,197,94,0.12);border-color:rgba(34,197,94,0.35);color:#86efac}
  .badge-purple{background:rgba(167,139,250,0.12);border-color:rgba(167,139,250,0.35);color:#c4b5fd}
  .badge-yellow{background:rgba(245,158,11,0.12);border-color:rgba(245,158,11,0.35);color:#fcd34d}
  .hero h1{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4.5vw,2.8rem);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.03em;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:14px;position:relative;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e6edf3 0%,#93c5fd 50%,#67e8f9 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
  .hero-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:1rem;max-width:560px;margin:0 auto 28px;position:relative}
  .meta-row{display:flex;gap:18px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;position:relative}
  .meta-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}
  .meta-item .dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);flex-shrink:0}
  .container{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;padding:56px 24px 80px}
  .section-title{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--text);margin:56px 0 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding-bottom:14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .section-num{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}
  .objectives{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
  .obj-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:13px 16px;font-size:14px;transition:border-color .2s,transform .15s}
  .obj-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateX(4px)}
  .obj-n{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:6px;flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(59,130,246,0.15);color:#93c5fd;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin-top:1px}
  .etape{margin:32px 0 0;animation:fadeUp .4s ease both}
  @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
  .etape-title{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
  .etape-num{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2);white-space:nowrap}
  .os-label{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);margin:12px 0 6px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em}
  .code-block{background:var(--code-bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;margin:6px 0 12px}
  .code-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:9px 14px;background:var(--surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .code-lang{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase}
  .code-dots{display:flex;gap:5px}
  .dot-r{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:#ef4444}
  .dot-y{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:#f59e0b}
  .dot-g{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:#22c55e}
  pre{margin:0;padding:18px 20px;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:var(--border) transparent}
  code{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.85;color:#e6edf3;white-space:pre}
  .kw{color:#f97583}.str{color:#79c0ff}.cmd{color:#d2a8ff}.cmt{color:#6e7681;font-style:italic}.val{color:#56d364}.url{color:#ffa657}.flag{color:#79c0ff}
  .params{margin:10px 0 14px}
  .param-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:8px 14px;border-left:2px solid var(--border);font-size:13px;margin-bottom:4px;transition:border-color .2s}
  .param-item:hover{border-left-color:var(--accent2)}
  .param-key{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:#79c0ff;flex-shrink:0;min-width:220px}
  .param-val{color:var(--muted)}
  .tip{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;padding:12px 16px;border-radius:9px;font-size:13.5px;margin:10px 0}
  .tip-warn{background:rgba(245,158,11,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.25)}
  .num-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin:12px 0}
  .num-item{display:flex;gap:12px;font-size:13.5px;color:var(--text);align-items:flex-start}
  .num-c{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2);margin-top:3px}
  .bul-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;margin:10px 0}
  .bul-item{display:flex;gap:10px;font-size:13.5px;color:var(--text);align-items:flex-start}
  .bul-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent2);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:8px}
  /* SCREENSHOT — real image */
  .screenshot-block{margin:16px 0 24px;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface)}
  .screenshot-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:10px 16px;background:var(--surface2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .cap-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:rgba(34,197,94,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.35);color:#86efac;border-radius:5px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase}
  .cap-name{font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)}
  .screenshot-block img{width:100%;display:block}
  .conn-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:14px 0;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border)}
  .conn-table th{background:var(--surface2);padding:9px 14px;text-align:left;color:var(--muted);font-size:10.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .conn-table td{padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(48,54,61,0.5);font-size:13px}
  .conn-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
  .conn-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02)}
  .conn-table td:first-child{color:var(--muted)}
  .conn-table td:last-child{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:#79c0ff;font-size:12px}
  .exercises{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px}
  .ex-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .2s}
  .ex-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent2)}
  .ex-head{padding:12px 18px;background:var(--surface2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-weight:700;font-size:13.5px}
  .ex-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:5px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#fff}
  .ex-body{padding:16px 18px}
  .reset-box{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:24px;margin-top:60px}
  .reset-title{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;color:#fca5a5;margin-bottom:14px}
  .footer{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:36px 24px;text-align:center}
  .footer-inner{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto}
  .result-row{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:28px}
  .result-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:rgba(34,197,94,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.25);border-radius:7px;padding:7px 14px;font-size:12.5px;color:#86efac;font-weight:500}
  .author-card{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px 22px}
  .avatar{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:.95rem;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}
  .author-name{font-weight:700;font-size:14px}
  .author-sub{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;margin-top:2px}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="badge-row">
    <span class="badge badge-blue">🎓 Collège Boréal</span>
    <span class="badge badge-cyan">🐘 PostgreSQL 16</span>
    <span class="badge badge-green">🐳 Docker / Podman</span>
    <span class="badge badge-yellow">🖥 pgAdmin 4</span>
    <span class="badge badge-purple">📅 2026</span>
  </div>
  <h1>TP PostgreSQL avec Docker<br>Base Sakila</h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">Ce TP nous guide à travers l'installation et la configuration de PostgreSQL avec Docker, ainsi que l'utilisation de pgAdmin 4.</p>
  <div class="meta-row">
    <div class="meta-item"><span class="dot"></span>Salim Amir</div>
    <div class="meta-item"><span class="dot"></span>#300150293</div>
    <div class="meta-item"><span class="dot"></span>INF1099 · Collège Boréal</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="container">

  <div class="section-title"><span class="section-num">🎯</span>Objectifs</div>
  <div class="objectives">
    <div class="obj-item"><span class="obj-n">1</span>Installer PostgreSQL dans Docker</div>
    <div class="obj-item"><span class="obj-n">2</span>Charger la base de données Sakila dans PostgreSQL</div>
    <div class="obj-item"><span class="obj-n">3</span>Installer pgAdmin 4 avec Chocolatey (Windows)</div>
    <div class="obj-item"><span class="obj-n">4</span>Utiliser pgAdmin 4 pour se connecter et explorer la base de données</div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title"><span class="section-num">1</span>Installer PostgreSQL avec Docker</div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 1</span>Créer et lancer le conteneur PostgreSQL</div>
    <div class="os-label">🐧 Linux / Unix</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">Bash</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmd">docker container run</span> <span class="flag">-d</span> \
  <span class="flag">--name</span> postgres \
  <span class="flag">-e</span> <span class="val">POSTGRES_USER</span>=postgres \
  <span class="flag">-e</span> <span class="val">POSTGRES_PASSWORD</span>=postgres \
  <span class="flag">-e</span> <span class="val">POSTGRES_DB</span>=appdb \
  <span class="flag">-p</span> <span class="val">5432</span>:5432 \
  <span class="flag">-v</span> postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data \
  postgres:16</code></pre>
    </div>
    <div class="os-label">🪟 Windows (PowerShell)</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">PowerShell</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmd">docker container run</span> <span class="flag">-d</span> `
  <span class="flag">--name</span> postgres `
  <span class="flag">-e</span> <span class="val">POSTGRES_USER</span>=postgres `
  <span class="flag">-e</span> <span class="val">POSTGRES_PASSWORD</span>=postgres `
  <span class="flag">-e</span> <span class="val">POSTGRES_DB</span>=appdb `
  <span class="flag">-p</span> <span class="val">5432</span>:5432 `
  <span class="flag">-v</span> postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data `
  postgres:16</code></pre>
    </div>
    <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin:14px 0 8px;font-weight:600;">Explications des paramètres :</p>
    <div class="params">
      <div class="param-item"><span class="param-key">POSTGRES_USER</span><span class="param-val">Nom de l'utilisateur principal</span></div>
      <div class="param-item"><span class="param-key">POSTGRES_PASSWORD</span><span class="param-val">Mot de passe de l'utilisateur</span></div>
      <div class="param-item"><span class="param-key">POSTGRES_DB</span><span class="param-val">Base de données principale</span></div>
      <div class="param-item"><span class="param-key">-p 5432:5432</span><span class="param-val">Mappe le port du conteneur sur le port local</span></div>
      <div class="param-item"><span class="param-key">-v postgres_data:/var/lib/…</span><span class="param-val">Persistance des données</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 2</span>Vérifier que PostgreSQL fonctionne</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">PowerShell</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmd">docker container ls</span></code></pre>
    </div>
    <div class="screenshot-block">
      <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Capture 1</span><span class="cap-name">Conteneur postgres — statut Up</span></div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Capture etape 2">
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title"><span class="section-num">2</span>Charger la base Sakila</div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 3</span>Télécharger les fichiers Sakila</div>
    <div class="os-label">🐧 Linux</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">Bash</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmd">wget</span> <span class="url">https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jOOQ/sakila/master/postgres-sakila-db/postgres-sakila-schema.sql</span>
<span class="cmd">wget</span> <span class="url">https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jOOQ/sakila/master/postgres-sakila-db/postgres-sakila-insert-data.sql</span></code></pre>
    </div>
    <div class="os-label">🪟 Windows (PowerShell)</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">PowerShell</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmd">Invoke-WebRequest</span> `
  <span class="url">https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jOOQ/sakila/master/postgres-sakila-db/postgres-sakila-schema.sql</span> `
  <span class="flag">-OutFile</span> postgres-sakila-schema.sql

<span class="cmd">Invoke-WebRequest</span> `
  <span class="url">https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jOOQ/sakila/master/postgres-sakila-db/postgres-sakila-insert-data.sql</span> `
  <span class="flag">-OutFile</span> postgres-sakila-insert-data.sql</code></pre>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 4</span>Copier les fichiers dans le conteneur</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">PowerShell / CMD</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmd">docker container cp</span> postgres-sakila-schema.sql     postgres:/schema.sql
<span class="cmd">docker container cp</span> postgres-sakila-insert-data.sql postgres:/data.sql</code></pre>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 5</span>Exécuter les fichiers SQL dans PostgreSQL</div>
    <div class="tip tip-warn"><span>⚠️</span><span>Toujours exécuter le <strong>schéma avant les données</strong>.</span></div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">CMD</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmd">podman container exec</span> postgres psql <span class="flag">-U</span> postgres <span class="flag">-d</span> appdb <span class="flag">-f</span> /schema.sql
<span class="cmd">podman container exec</span> postgres psql <span class="flag">-U</span> postgres <span class="flag">-d</span> appdb <span class="flag">-f</span> /data.sql</code></pre>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 6</span>Vérifier que les tables Sakila sont présentes</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">CMD</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmd">podman container exec</span> postgres psql <span class="flag">-U</span> postgres <span class="flag">-d</span> appdb <span class="flag">-c</span> <span class="str">"\dt"</span>
<span class="cmd">podman container exec</span> postgres psql <span class="flag">-U</span> postgres <span class="flag">-d</span> appdb <span class="flag">-c</span> <span class="str">"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM film;"</span>
<span class="cmd">podman container exec</span> postgres psql <span class="flag">-U</span> postgres <span class="flag">-d</span> appdb <span class="flag">-c</span> <span class="str">"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM actor;"</span></code></pre>
    </div>
    <div class="screenshot-block">
      <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Capture 2</span><span class="cap-name">\dt — Liste des tables Sakila (21 tables)</span></div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Capture etape 3 - dt">
    </div>
    <div class="screenshot-block">
      <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Capture 3 & 4</span><span class="cap-name">COUNT(*) FROM film = 1000 / COUNT(*) FROM actor = 200</span></div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Capture etape 4 - count">
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title"><span class="section-num">3</span>Installer pgAdmin 4 avec Chocolatey (Windows)</div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 7</span>Installer et lancer pgAdmin 4</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">CMD (administrateur)</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmd">choco install</span> pgadmin4 <span class="flag">-y</span></code></pre>
    </div>
    <p style="font-size:13.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin:14px 0 8px;">Lancer pgAdmin :</p>
    <div class="bul-list">
      <div class="bul-item"><span class="bul-dot"></span><span>Depuis le menu <strong>Démarrer</strong> → pgAdmin 4</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title"><span class="section-num">4</span>Utiliser pgAdmin 4 pour se connecter à PostgreSQL</div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 8</span>Configurer la connexion dans pgAdmin 4</div>
    <div class="num-list">
      <div class="num-item"><span class="num-c">1</span><span>Cliquer sur <strong>Add New Server</strong></span></div>
      <div class="num-item"><span class="num-c">2</span><span>Onglet <strong>Général</strong> → Nom : <code style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:#79c0ff;font-size:12px;">Postgres Docker</code></span></div>
      <div class="num-item"><span class="num-c">3</span><span>Onglet <strong>Connection</strong> → remplir les champs :</span></div>
    </div>
    <table class="conn-table">
      <thead><tr><th>Paramètre</th><th>Valeur</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td>Host name / address</td><td>localhost</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Port</td><td>5432</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Maintenance database</td><td>appdb</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Username</td><td>postgres</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Password</td><td>postgres</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
    <div class="num-list" style="margin-top:10px;">
      <div class="num-item"><span class="num-c">4</span><span>Cliquer sur <strong>Save</strong></span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="screenshot-block">
      <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Capture 5</span><span class="cap-name">Configuration connexion pgAdmin — localhost:5432 / appdb</span></div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Capture etape 5 - pgAdmin config">
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 9</span>Explorer la base Sakila dans pgAdmin</div>
    <div class="num-list">
      <div class="num-item"><span class="num-c">1</span><span>Naviguer vers : <strong>Servers → Postgres Docker → Databases → appdb → Schemas → public → Tables</strong></span></div>
      <div class="num-item"><span class="num-c">2</span><span>Clic droit sur une table → <strong>View/Edit Data → All Rows</strong></span></div>
      <div class="num-item"><span class="num-c">3</span><span>Utiliser l'éditeur SQL : <strong>Tools → Query Tool</strong></span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="screenshot-block">
      <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Capture 6</span><span class="cap-name">pgAdmin — Dashboard connecté (Postgres Docker)</span></div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Capture etape 6 - pgAdmin dashboard">
    </div>
    <div class="screenshot-block">
      <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Capture 7</span><span class="cap-name">Tables Sakila — Tables (21) dans pgAdmin</span></div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Capture etape 7 - tables Sakila">
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title"><span class="section-num">5</span>Exercices pratiques</div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="exercises">
      <div class="ex-card">
        <div class="ex-head"><span class="ex-badge">📝 Ex. 1</span>Lister tous les films dont le titre contient "Star"</div>
        <div class="ex-body">
          <div class="code-block" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">SQL</span></div>
            <pre><code><span class="kw">SELECT</span> title <span class="kw">FROM</span> film <span class="kw">WHERE</span> title <span class="kw">ILIKE</span> <span class="str">'%Star%'</span>;</code></pre>
          </div>
          <div class="screenshot-block" style="margin:0">
            <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Résultat Ex. 1</span><span class="cap-name">STAR OPERATION, TURN STAR — 2 films trouvés</span></div>
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Exercice 1">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ex-card">
        <div class="ex-head"><span class="ex-badge">📝 Ex. 2</span>Compter le nombre d'acteurs</div>
        <div class="ex-body">
          <div class="code-block" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">SQL</span></div>
            <pre><code><span class="kw">SELECT</span> <span class="val">COUNT</span>(*) <span class="kw">FROM</span> actor;</code></pre>
          </div>
          <div class="screenshot-block" style="margin:0">
            <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Résultat Ex. 2</span><span class="cap-name">200 acteurs</span></div>
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Exercice 2">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ex-card">
        <div class="ex-head"><span class="ex-badge">📝 Ex. 3</span>Afficher les 5 premiers clients</div>
        <div class="ex-body">
          <div class="code-block" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">SQL</span></div>
            <pre><code><span class="kw">SELECT</span> customer_id, first_name, last_name, email
<span class="kw">FROM</span>   customer
<span class="kw">LIMIT</span>  <span class="val">5</span>;</code></pre>
          </div>
          <div class="screenshot-block" style="margin:0">
            <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Résultat Ex. 3</span><span class="cap-name">5 premiers clients — MARY, PATRICIA, LINDA, BARBARA, ELIZABETH</span></div>
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Exercice 3">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="reset-box">
    <div class="reset-title">🔄 Réinitialisation complète</div>
    <p style="font-size:13.5px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:14px;">Supprime le conteneur et le volume — <strong style="color:#fca5a5;">toutes les données seront perdues.</strong></p>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">CMD / PowerShell</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmd">docker container rm</span> <span class="flag">-f</span> postgres
<span class="cmd">docker volume rm</span> postgres_data
<span class="cmd">docker volume ls</span></code></pre>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="footer">
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.13em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:18px;">🎉 Résultats atteints</div>
    <div class="result-row">
      <div class="result-item">✅ PostgreSQL déployé</div>
      <div class="result-item">✅ Base Sakila importée</div>
      <div class="result-item">✅ pgAdmin connecté</div>
      <div class="result-item">✅ 7 captures intégrées</div>
      <div class="result-item">✅ Exercices SQL complétés</div>
    </div>
    <div class="author-card">
      <div class="avatar">SA</div>
      <div>
        <div class="author-name">Salim Amir</div>
        <div class="author-sub">#300150293 · INF1099 · Collège Boréal · 2026</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</body>
</html>
